title: senecio ostenii var. ostenii
intro: Senecio ostenii var. ostenii, also known as Osten's ragwort or Osten's Jacob's ladder, is a plant species in the daisy family, Asteraceae, native to South Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpenes and alkaloids. The health benefits of Senecio ostenii var. ostenii include its ability to treat various conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin disorders, as well as its potential to act as an antiseptic and antimicrobial agent. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and can be applied topically or ingested to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
